reference: My baby is two and a half months old. My breast milk supply is very low, and I have to give formula milk to fulfill her requirements. However, I do not know how much quantity should be given to my baby in each feed and its preparation because, according to the directions on the formula, it seems concentrated.
text: My baby is two and a half months. My breast milk supply is very low, and I have to give formula milk to fulfill her requirements. However, I do not know how much quantity should contain baby each feed in its preparation because, according to the directions on the formula, it seems concentrated.
